raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "docs/PRE-LAUNCH-BLOCKERS-STATUS.md", "issue": "Blocker #15 (Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance) marked as 🟥 ready to build — implementation missing DID issuer, cryptographic proofs, revocation endpoint", "recommended_fix": "Build Open Badges 3.0 integration with cryptographic signing and DID-based issuance; use existing schema/transformer files"}, {"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "docs/PRE-LAUNCH-BLOCKERS-STATUS.md", "issue": "Blocker #16 (MIRT upgrade) marked as 🟥 — still using 8 independent 3PL models, not unified multidimensional IRT", "recommended_fix": "Upgrade assessment engine to MIRT model to improve score accuracy and cross-competency correlation"}, {"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "Energy Adaptation Law 2", "issue": "Law 2 not enforced in 4/5 products despite being Foundation Law — Energy Picker only in VOLAURA", "recommended_fix": "Extend Energy Mode (Full/Mid/Low) to MindShift, LifeSim, BrandedBy, ZEUS with `data-energy` attribute and adaptive UI"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "P0 gamification violation: Crystal Law 6 Amendment breached — badge tiers shown immediately post-assessment, creating contingent reward for mastery task", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/components/assessment/completion-page.tsx", "packages/atlas-core/assessment/mirt_upgrade_plan.md"]}

findings.issue: Blocker #15 (Open Badges 3.0 VC compliance) marked as 🟥 ready to build — implementation missing DID issuer, cryptographic proofs, revocation endpoint
findings.recommended_fix: Build Open Badges 3.0 integration with cryptographic signing and DID-based issuance; use existing schema/transformer files

findings.issue: Blocker #16 (MIRT upgrade) marked as 🟥 — still using 8 independent 3PL models, not unified multidimensional IRT
findings.recommended_fix: Upgrade assessment engine to MIRT model to improve score accuracy and cross-competency correlation

findings.issue: Law 2 not enforced in 4/5 products despite being Foundation Law — Energy Picker only in VOLAURA
findings.recommended_fix: Extend Energy Mode (Full/Mid/Low) to MindShift, LifeSim, BrandedBy, ZEUS with `data-energy` attribute and adaptive UI

whistleblower_flag: P0 gamification violation: Crystal Law 6 Amendment breached — badge tiers shown immediately post-assessment, creating contingent reward for mastery task
